description:
🕒 09:00–14:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Special vehicle displays, disaster prevention experience activities (fire extinguisher, water spray, smoke experience, firefighter gear try-on), stage events, 3rd Hanno Fire Department Firefighting Skills Competition, and multiple food trucks. Free admission, no advance registration required.
location: 飯能市役所 西側駐車場 (飯能市双柳1-1)
summary: Hanno Fire and Disaster Prevention Festival 2026
